intake.user_request: Run populate-coderef --source-headers on CODEREF-CORE itself on branch feature/source-headers-dogfood. Create the branch, run the command, review the diff, commit if headers look correct. Do not merge to main — leave on branch for review.

classification.plan_type_rationale: Single command execution (populate-coderef --source-headers) on a feature branch, followed by diff review and conditional commit. No code changes to logic, no phases, no hard stops. Outcome is a diff for human review.

in_scope: Review the diff of modified source files
Commit the result if headers look correct
Leave branch unmerged — do NOT merge to main
out_of_scope: Modifying the source-headers implementation in populate.ts or CLI
Changes to .coderef/ output artifacts (those are gitignored)

constraints: Do NOT merge to main — branch is for review only
Only commit if headers look semantically correct (no garbled output)
If populate-coderef --source-headers exits non-zero, halt and report
